hi everyone, i have heard good things about horla for a while and i ended up with her at e2. is she actually good? how can i learn to play her better?
horla is good at e1
e2 is very optional
shes good because if you play 1 of her 4 cards first in a turn
you get a permanent aura buff, until you play another of her card first(triggering the leap effect)
for a start, you can just identify whcih of her buff you need for your team, play that card with leap effect, and dont play her with leap effect for the rest of the fight
once you understand how her buffs works, you can start to switch the aura buff depending on the situation
